zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Killigrew於1580年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir Henry Killigrew52歲，母親Katherine Cooke38歲。她和Edward Beauchamp Seymour至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1643年6月30日在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文素斯 哈姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Killigrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Killigrew in Saint Erme (Cornwall).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Killigrew was born in 1580, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir Henry Killigrew, was 52 and her mother, Katherine Cooke, was 38. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Edward Beauchamp Seymour. She died on 30 June 1643, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in South Hams, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Killigrew est née en 1580, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Killigrew, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Katherine Cooke, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Edward Beauchamp Seymour. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1643, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à South Hams, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Killigrew 1580 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Killigrew 52 und ihre Mutter Katherine Cooke 38. Sie hatte mit Edward Beauchamp Seymour mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1643 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in South Hams, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Killigrew è nata il nel 1580 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Killigrew, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Katherine Cooke, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Edward Beauchamp Seymour. Morì il 30 giugno 1643, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a South Hams, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Killigrewが1580年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Killigrewは52歳，母Katherine Cookeは38歳であった。彼女はEdward Beauchamp Seymourとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1643年6月30日にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンソウス ハムズにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Killigrew(이)가 1580년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Killigrew(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Cooke(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Edward Beauchamp Seymour(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1643년 6월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 소우스 함스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Killigrew nasceu em 1580, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Killigrew, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Cooke, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Edward Beauchamp Seymour. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1643, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: лондон ст питир л поир вит ст бинет финк, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Killigrew родилась в 1580 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Killigrew было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Cooke, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Edward Beauchamp Seymour. Она умерла 30 июня 1643 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности соут хамс, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Killigrew nació en 1580, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Killigrew, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Katherine Cooke, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Edward Beauchamp Seymour. Murió el 30 de junio de 1643, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
